body:
# Max Daniel

**Role:** Chair

[Max Daniel](https://www.linkedin.com/in/max-daniel/) is Chief of Staff at [Open Philanthropy](https://www.openphilanthropy.org/). Previously, he has worked in research and project management roles at several organizations in the effective altruism community, including the Future of Humanity Institute and Forethought Foundation. He has a master’s in mathematics from Heidelberg University.
